templates.name: How much does it cost to get an ear piercing?
templates.content: Our piercing kits start at just $29.99 and include the piercing earring, piercing service and Aftercare Solution. Depending on what type of earring you would like for your piercing (Stainless Steel, 14K gold, diamond, etc.), piercing pricing can range from $29.99 to $100+.

templates.name: Do you offer expedited shipping?
templates.content: We offer Express shipping (up to 3 business days) and Next Day shipping (up to 2 business days). Orders must be placed Monday-Friday by 12pm CST. Please note that orders placed on Friday after 12pm CST, will not process and ship out until the following business day (Monday), as we do not process orders Saturday & Sunday.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://www.claires.com/us/clearance/

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.claires.com/us/returns-policy.html

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at customersupport@claires.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $25. For C.CLUB Friends members we offer free shipping on orders over $20 and C.CLUB Besties members receive free shipping on all orders.

templates.name: How do I place an order online and pick up in store?
templates.content: Simply select your location at any time and choose "Pick-Up" as your delivery method in the shopping bag. All stores with buy online, pick up in-store available will display a green checkbox and the message "Pickup: Ready in 2 hours or less."

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1-800-804-7194, Monday - Friday 9am - 6pm, and Saturday - Sunday 12pm - 4pm CST or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: Once your order is submitted, we begin processing it immediately. During this time we cannot add or remove items, or otherwise modify or cancel your order. I apologize for any inconvenience this may cause!

templates.name: How long will I have to pick up my order in store?
templates.content: You will have at least 7 days to pick up your order.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can learn more and apply for our Affiliate program here: https://www.claires.com/us/affiliate-program.html

templates.name: Do you offer student discount?
templates.content: You can learn more and apply for your discount here: https://connect.studentbeans.com/v4/hosted/claire-s/us/

templates.name: When can I pick up my order in store?
templates.content:
When your order is ready for pickup, you'll receive a pickup notification via email. Your order will be held at the store for 7 days. If your order isn't picked up after 7 days, we'll cancel the order and issue a refund in the original method of payment.

Once you arrive at the store, please see a store associate to pick up your order.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://stores.claires.com/us/

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/clairesstores/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/claires/

templates.name: Can I return my online order in store?
templates.content: You may choose to return or exchange your merchandise at a Claire's store near you: https://stores.claires.com/us/ Please have both a government-issued ID and the original receipt displaying prices paid to receive a full credit. If you used a credit card to make your purchase, please have that available for the store associate to credit your account. If you used PayPal to make your purchase, a full store credit will be made to Claire's gift card. For returns without a receipt we will issue a store credit in the form of a gift card for the current selling price.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Orders are processed Monday - Friday excluding holidays. Once shipped it will take up to 7 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://www.claires.com/us/track-order/

templates.name: Some items are not available for pickup in-store. What should I do?
templates.content: I'm afraid not every item displayed is available at every store. If an item in your shopping bag is not available for pickup at your desired location, please select another store, ship the order to your address, or remove the item from your shopping bag.

templates.name: How do I return my order via mail?
templates.content:
If you ordered your merchandise from us online and would like to make a return by mail, include the merchandise in its original, unused condition, with tags and packaging, along with the return form provided in your order shipment. Please send your return via carrier of your choice to the address below. We do not offer prepaid labels for return shipping. If we ship an incorrect, defective, or damaged item we will issue a refund for the return shipping charge via a Claire's gift card. We recommend using an insured and traceable delivery method. Ship to:

Claires.com
Returns Department
2400 West Central Road
Hoffman Estates, IL 60192

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at customersupport@claires.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Do I have to book a piercing appointment?
templates.content:
Walk-ins are welcome during stores hours. Just drop by and see our Piercing Specialists for a consultation. We also offer online booking in select markets. See our store locator: https://claires.attn.tv/a10WVJAZe-7S/ to find your nearest Claire's.

Please note that we follow local guidelines closely, so some stores may operate an 'appointment only' service based on local authority requirements.

templates.name: What should I avoid doing after my piercing?
templates.content: Always try to keep your new ear piercing free from soap, perfumes and hair products, and take care when brushing your hair, exercising, playing sports, talking on your phone, sleeping or wearing headphones. We suggest that you avoid swimming for 24 hours after your piercing and, thereafter, make sure you clean your ears with your Claire's After Care Solution, follow your recommended aftercare schedule, and make sure to always wash your hands before touching your new piercing.

templates.name: When can I change my piercing? (Cartilage Piercing)
templates.content:
A new piercing is exciting and we know you will want to try new styles soon. However, it is important to give your ears time to heal before changing your ear piercing.

For cartilage, you will need to leave your earring in for at least 12 weeks with our Standard After Care Solution. With the use of Rapid After Care Solution you can usually change your cartilage piercing after 8 weeks.

templates.name: Can I use the code in-store?
templates.content: Good question! Yes, if you're lucky enough to get one of our promo codes, you can show it to the cashier or simply type it into the special promo code box when you are ready to checkout on https://claires.com/us
